benefits.description: Lost 75 pounds on tirzepatide, hoping retatrutide will help lose the remaining 30 lbs

side_effects.description: Exhaustion on previous compound (implied semaglutide/tirz), no exhaustion noted on day 2 of Reta
No nausea on Reta so far
Hunger creeping back in on day 3 or 4 on previous protocol, prompting switch to Reta

protocol_notes: Switched to retatrutide after experiencing hunger return on days 3-4 and exhaustion on prior GLP-1 protocol. Only on day 2 of retatrutide at time of posting. Previously lost 75 lbs on tirzepatide, aiming to lose 30 more.
